summary: Sprint 21 Mission Command Center testing completed. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend admin dashboard, public missions page, participation dialog, and end-to-end config propagation verified successfully.
passed_tests: GET /api/mission-config returns merged config with all default fields
POST /api/mission-participations with valid data returns 200 + participation_id + email_queued=true
POST /api/mission-participations is idempotent on (mission_id, email_hash)
POST /api/mission-participations with unknown mission_id returns 400
POST /api/mission-participations with invalid email returns 422
GET /api/admin/mission-config/snapshot returns config + participation_counts + illustrations
PUT /api/admin/mission-config accepts partial patch (reward_sol 5 → 7.5 → 12)
PUT /api/admin/mission-config with negative reward_sol returns 400
PUT /api/admin/mission-config with unknown field returns 400
GET /api/admin/mission-participations returns list with email_sent flag
GET /api/admin/mission-participations with mission_id filter works correctly
POST /api/admin/mission-participations/{id}/resend works (email re-sent)
POST /api/admin/mission-config/illustrations/{mission_id}/regenerate endpoint shape verified
POST /api/admin/mission-config/illustrations/unknown/regenerate returns 404
PUT /api/admin/mission-config can update missions status (live → completed)
PUT /api/admin/mission-config with invalid mission status returns 400
/admin/missions-command renders all 4 sections (giveaway, extraction-chamber, missions, emails)
/admin/missions-command requires admin login (redirects to /admin)
/admin/missions-command shows all 6 mission override rows
/admin/missions-command participations table shows recent submissions
/admin/missions-command resend button triggers email re-send
/missions page loads with hero, stats, and missions grid
/missions shows all 6 mission cards with correct status badges
/missions 'Recevoir le brief' button opens participation dialog
Mission participation dialog has all required fields (email, wallet, submit)
Mission participation dialog submits successfully and closes
/giveaway page shows updated reward amount (12 SOL from admin change)
/giveaway page shows draw date (May 22, 2026)
End-to-end: Admin config changes propagate to public pages within 500ms
End-to-end: User participation appears in admin dashboard immediately
